# Patties

> Patties is a Bun-native full-stack meta-framework. HTTP is Bun.serve, bundling
> is Bun.build, filesystem discovery is Bun.Glob, dev hot-reload is bun --hot.
> UI is React 19 over renderToReadableStream with opt-in client islands. Route
> and island discovery happens once at build time and is inlined into the
> production bundle, so the server never re-scans the disk at runtime. Handlers
> receive a standard Request and return a standard Response; the only added
> affordance is a thin PattiesContext. Deploy targets (bun, edge) live behind
> adapters. Ships as three npm packages: patties (framework), create-patties
> (scaffolder), patties-ui (60 copy-in shadcn-compatible components).

## Documentation

- [Overview](docs/overview.html): what Patties is and the problems it solves
- [App structure](docs/app-structure.html): the folder convention
- [Project scaffolding](docs/scaffolding.html): create-patties prompt flow
- [Framework overview](docs/framework-overview.html): the runtime in depth
- [Routing](docs/routing.html): filesystem routes → Bun route patterns
- [Server](docs/server.html): the Bun.serve request lifecycle
- [Rendering and islands](docs/rendering-islands.html): React 19 SSR + islands
- [Middleware and context](docs/middleware-context.html): compose() + PattiesContext
- [Configuration and environment](docs/configuration.html): patties.config.ts + env
- [Build pipeline](docs/build-pipeline.html): discovery, entries, manifest
- [Adapters and targets](docs/adapters-targets.html): bun + edge deploy
- [Plugins](docs/plugins.html): build/dev/job hooks
- [AI and agents](docs/ai-agents.html): optional agents, tools, jobs
- [AGENTS.md generation](docs/agents-md.html): app inventory for coding agents
- [CLI overview](docs/cli-overview.html): the patties command
- [dev](docs/dev.html), [build](docs/build.html), [deploy](docs/deploy.html), [secrets](docs/secrets.html)
